category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/PyCQA/bandit describes Bandit as a tool for finding common security issues in Python code.
source_facts.description says Bandit is a security-oriented static analyzer for Python code.
display_name_sources: Official docs and README use the project name Bandit.
docs_sources: Official README lists https://bandit.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ as Documentation.
repo_sources: Official README lists Source as https://github.com/PyCQA/bandit.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include python, security, static-code-analysis, linter, security-scanner, and security-tools.
source_facts.description and executables identify a Python security static-analysis CLI.
